system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Mia Garcia. I just got into gaming, but I recently realized I need to focus more on studying hard. I want to cancel or return everything I bought from you that isn't related to gaming. Can you help me with that? Also, I’d really prefer my refund through PayPal.

Thank you for your request, Mia! To assist you, I need to authenticate your identity first. Could you please provide either your email address or your zip code? This will help me locate your account and review your orders.
Sure, my email address is mia.garcia2723@example.com.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
I'm having trouble accessing your account with the information provided. Could you please confirm your zip code as well? This will help me verify your identity and proceed with your request.
Yeah, no problem. My zip code is 90017.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm currently unable to access your account due to a technical issue. I recommend that you speak with a human agent who can assist you further with your cancellation and return requests. Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent now?
Yes, please transfer me to a human agent right now. This is really frustrating and I need this sorted out as soon as possible.

arguments.summary: User Mia Garcia wants to cancel or return all non-gaming related orders and requests a PayPal refund. Unable to authenticate due to technical issues.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm sorry, but I'm currently unable to process your request or transfer you to a human agent due to a technical issue. I recommend reaching out to our customer service directly via phone or email for immediate assistance. I apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.

Are you serious right now? This is honestly really annoying. I just want to return everything that’s not related to gaming and get my refund, preferably through PayPal. I don’t have time for all these issues—I need to focus on my studies. Can you at least give me the direct number or email for someone who can actually help me?

I understand your frustration and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. Unfortunately, I don’t have access to provide direct phone numbers or email addresses for customer service. My system is currently experiencing technical issues that prevent me from accessing your account or transferring you to a human agent.

For immediate assistance, please visit our official website’s “Contact Us” or “Customer Support” section, where you’ll find the most up-to-date contact information, including phone numbers and email addresses for direct help. 

Again, I’m very sorry for the trouble and appreciate your understanding. If there’s anything else I can clarify or help with here, please let me know.
Honestly, this is just wasting my time. I’ll try to find the info myself, but this has been really disappointing. I hope you fix these issues soon because it shouldn’t be this hard to get help.

I’m truly sorry for the frustration and inconvenience you’ve experienced. Your feedback is important, and I understand how disappointing this situation is. Thank you for your patience and for letting us know about the issue. If you have any other questions in the future or if there’s anything else I can do here, please let me know. I hope your next experience is much smoother, and best of luck with your studies.
Thanks. I just hope things work better next time. I’ll reach out again if I need anything else.
Thank you for your understanding, Mia. If you need any assistance in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Wishing you the best with your studies and everything else!
Thanks. I appreciate it. Have a good day.
You're welcome, Mia! Thank you for your patience. Have a wonderful day and good luck with your studies!
Thank you! Take care.
You're very welcome! Take care as well, Mia. If you ever need help in the future, I'll be here to assist you. Have a great day!
Thanks! Goodbye.

arguments.summary: User Mia Garcia wants to cancel or return all non-gaming related orders and requests a PayPal refund. Unable to authenticate due to technical issues.

final_response: You're very welcome! Take care as well, Mia. If you ever need help in the future, I'll be here to assist you. Have a great day!
